status_notes: Launched ~June 2026; no dedicated domain yet — hosted under chainguard.dev. Membership expanding.
notes: Industry coalition led by Chainguard for the coordinated (orchestrated) defense and remediation of open-source software vulnerabilities. Members include Chainguard, BNY, Cisco, Cloudflare, Docker, JPMorganChase, Kyndryl, PwC and others. Chainguard has stated an intent to work with the Linux Foundation on a coordinated OSS Security Incident Response Team (SIRT) and a 'maintainer of last resort' program — aspirational as of mid-2026. If/when that coordinated-disclosure program launches, add a secid:disclosure/chainguard.dev/athena record with subtype coordinator.

match_nodes.description: Athena — Chainguard-led open-source vulnerability defense coalition

data.description: Industry coalition for orchestrated defense and remediation of open-source software vulnerabilities, led by Chainguard.
